name: goal-setter
description: Shape rough requests into compact, evidence-backed /goal completion contracts before long autonomous runs.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-backed goal contracts for long autonomous runs
interface.longDescription: Turns a rough request into a compact /goal completion contract: intended-outcome image first, clarification and bounded-exploration gates, anti-gaming constraints, evidence-audited progress rules, and a readiness audit before activation. Works with Codex goal tools and Claude Code /goal.
defaultPrompt: Set a goal: shape this request into a completion contract.
Draft a goal contract for this task without activating it.
Shape this splittable work into a goal that structures the independent pieces for parallel execution.
